upload.title: Upload Orchestration
upload.subtitle: Files enter queued first and then upload serially
upload.localValidationWarning: File {fileName} did not pass local suggested validation; the backend result wins
upload.serviceUnavailable: Upload failed. The service is temporarily unavailable
upload.missingRecycleNumber: Task {fileName} is missing allocation metadata and cannot be recycled
upload.deleteFailedRecycle: Delete failed. The number was not recycled
upload.deleteFailedProcess: Delete failed. Cloud recycle flow failed

preview.title: Preview
preview.searchPlaceholder: Search by file name / traceId / number
preview.cloudPreviewHint: Use the button in the top right to fetch the CDN copy for comparison
preview.compareMismatch: Local and cloud hashes do not match

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.imageCompressDescription: Resize by longest edge before upload, then apply quality compression
plugins.hiddenWatermarkDescription: Write a low-opacity marker into the image corner before upload
plugins.signatureRejectedToast: {name} signature verification failed and was rolled back to disabled
plugins.wafDescription: Generate Cloudflare anti-probing rules from the current allocation digit count
plugins.wafSourceLabel: Source: active object snapshot + backend sync
plugins.wafHint: The rule is synced after upload completion and recycle; the display mirrors the active object allowlist
plugins.wafObjectsReadonly: Read-only: sourced from backend active object snapshot
plugins.wafObjectsEmpty: No active objects yet. Entries appear here after uploads complete

settings.title: Settings
settings.unsavedConfirm: Unsaved changes exist. Leave this page?
settings.initRiskDescription: Storage setup is not initialized yet. Continuing may trigger high-risk behavior (upload failures, number mapping drift, or WAF false blocking). Complete initialization in Settings first.
settings.resetAppConfirm: This clears settings, logs, and allocation cache, then restores defaults. Continue?
